title: works: --help and --version are both broken: they print 'Unknown command: --help/--version' and exit 0 (success). …
description:
[P1 · works · audit] --help and --version are both broken: they print 'Unknown command: --help/--version' and exit 0 (success). The universal CLI discovery flags do not work, violating the project's own CLI Rule #3 and Definition of Done ('--help output is accurate').

Evidence: node bin/sentinel.js --version -> 'Unknown command: --version', EXIT:0; node bin/sentinel.js --help -> 'Unknown command: --help', EXIT:0. src/cli/index.ts has no help/version handling; dispatcher falls through to unknown-command branch.

Fix: Add explicit --help/--version handling in src/cli/index.ts that prints usage/version to stdout and exits 0; keep unknown *commands* exiting 1.

Source: launch-readiness audit 2026-06-18
